title: Special: USTR's New Proposal - Obstacle or Opportunity
section_path: Special: USTR's New Proposal - Obstacle or Opportunity
section_path_text: Special: USTR's New Proposal - Obstacle or Opportunity
summary:
Main
Image reference: RGB_COLOR_BRS_SHIPBROKERS_MONOGRAM_LOGO.png | assets/2025-03-18_special-ustrs-new-proposal-obstacle-or-opportunity_img_rgb-color-brs-shipbrokers-monogram-l_ee79606c8e74.png
It is a well-known fact that China is the 800-pound gorilla when it comes to dry bulk trade volumes and shipbuilding. That said, the US is no small pushover. In 2024, it was simultaneously the world's fifth largest drybulk exporter (at 311.6 mln mt) and seventh largest importer (at 124.9 mln mt).
